name: Crocodile (060)
subtypes: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
effect_text: [On Play] DON!! -2 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): If your Leader's type includes "Baroque Works", add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards. [On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] DON!! -1: Draw 1 card and trash 1 card from your hand.
